summaryAm: ደከመኛ ጫማ ሰፊ እና ትንንሽ ደግ ረዳቶች ስለ ሥራ፣ ምስጋና እና ማጋራት የሚያስተምሩበት ታሪክ።
moralAm: ሥራ እና ደግነት ሲገናኙ ቤት ይበራል፤ ምስጋናም ደግነትን ያበዛል።

source.name: Grimm fairy tale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This adaptation keeps the magical helpers gentle.

pages.textAm: አንድ ጫማ ሰፊ ከሚስቱ ጋር ትንሽ ሱቅ ውስጥ ይሠራ ነበር። እጆቹ ደክመው ነበር፣ ግን ልቡ ደግ ነበር።
pages.textEn: A shoemaker and his wife worked in a small shop with kind hearts.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A kind shoemaker and wife in a cozy small shoe shop with leather and tools.

pages.textAm: አንድ ሌሊት ጫማ ሰፊው የተቆረጠ ቆዳ በጠረጴዛ ላይ ተወው። “ነገ እጨርሰዋለሁ” ብሎ አረፈ።
pages.textEn: One night he left cut leather on the table and went to rest.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Cut leather pieces resting on a wooden worktable under moonlight.

pages.textAm: ጠዋት ሲነሳ ቆንጆ ጫማዎች ተሠርተው አገኘ። ጫማዎቹ እንደ ትንሽ ቀስተ ደመና ይበሩ ነበር።
pages.textEn: In the morning he found beautiful shoes already made.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Beautiful handmade shoes glowing softly on the shoemaker's table in morning light.

pages.textAm: በሌላ ሌሊት እሱና ሚስቱ በጸጥታ ተመለከቱ። ሁለት ትንንሽ ደግ ረዳቶች መጡና በደስታ መስፋት ጀመሩ።
pages.textEn: Another night they quietly saw two tiny helpers sewing happily.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Two tiny friendly helpers sewing shoes at night while the couple watches kindly.

pages.textAm: ጫማ ሰፊው እና ሚስቱ ለረዳቶቹ ትንንሽ ሞቃት ልብሶችን ሠሩ። “እናመሰግናለን” ብለው በጠረጴዛው ላይ አኖሩ።
pages.textEn: The shoemaker and his wife made warm tiny clothes to say thank you.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Tiny warm clothes placed on the shoemaker's table as a thank-you gift.

pages.textAm: ረዳቶቹ ስጦታውን ሲያዩ በደስታ ዘፈኑ። ጫማ ሰፊውም ከዚያ በኋላ ሥራውን በምስጋና እና በደግነት ቀጠለ።
pages.textEn: The helpers sang with joy, and the shoemaker kept working with gratitude.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Tiny helpers dancing happily in new clothes while the shoemaker and wife smile.
